name: Discovery Silver Corp.
description: Discovery Silver Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on advancing its flagship Cordero project, one of the world's largest undeveloped silver deposits, located in Chihuahua State, Mexico. The company aims to create significant value through the development of this large-scale, high-margin asset, which also contains substantial zinc, lead, and gold resources. Discovery Silver is committed to responsible mining practices and leveraging its experienced management team to transition Cordero from a premier development-stage project into a world-class silver producer.
